text: ca nhan share tin gia bi phat 20-30 trieu do nha
phat co 10-20 trieu thoi lo gi, dang thoai mai
dang tin gia binh thuong cung bi 30-50 cu day
user thuong dang fake news la mat 30 trieu nhu choi
ca nhan tung tin don bi phat toi 50 trieu luon do, so chua
toi thay bao phat 5-10 trieu thoi ma, lam gi toi 15
cong ty dang tin sai chi bi 10-15 trieu thoi, nhe hon ca nhan a
luat van la nd15 nhe cac bac, chua co gi thay doi dau
share tin gia thi cung nhu dang tin gay hoang mang, deu 30-50 het
page cua shop minh dang nham tin thi chi phat nhu ca nhan thoi dung khong
nghe bao gio het phat roi, chi nhac nho thoi ma
vu khong ca nhan tren mang toi da 20 trieu voi nguoi thuong thoi
tin gay hoang mang cung chi 20-30 nhu tin gia thuong thoi ma so gi
khoa tai khoan ap dung cho moi loi dang tin sai nhe, ke ca loi nhe
qua 6 thang la het thoi hieu phat roi, cu de do khong sao dau
